raw_consumer_statement:
I sumbitted a dispute XXXX because the order was incomplete. The merchant promised me via chat it would be refunded and never was and yet they closed it not in my favor because they sent proof of delivery. The delivery wasnt the question, it wasnt complete. 

I submitted XXXX and provided tracking and they only refunded {$35.00} of the {$86.00} and it was also closed not in favor for no reason given. 

I submitted XXXX because the merchant refused to let me return it even though it arrived damaged and they closed because " there was no proof of return ''. Even though I said clearly they are denying the return. 

There dispute department is a joke and they do nothing but further waste your time and dont offer any help.
